[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 1111001010 6
1 0101011001 5
2 0010110101 5
3 1011100110 6
4 0111101101 7
5 1101111111 9
6 1110011010 6
7 1111011111 9

01 10 1101001110 6
12 21 1101011101 7
23 32 1101011111 8
34 43 1011011111 8
45 54 1011111111 9
56 65 1011110111 8
67 76 1011100010 5
70 07 1001000110 4

02 20 1101011111 8
13 31 1100011010 5
24 42 1111011101 8
35 53 1001111111 8
46 64 1011101101 7
57 75 1001110111 7
60 06 1011100110 6 match 3
71 17 1101001010 5

03 30 1001011110 6
14 41 1111001101 7
25 52 1101111111 9 match 5
36 63 1011111010 7
47 74 1011001111 7
50 05 1001110111 7
61 16 0111101000 5
72 27 1101011111 8

15 51 1101111111 9 match 5
26 62 1111111101 9
37 73 1001011010 5
